name: Veiled Alliance
description: A clandestine operative within the hidden preservers' network. Skill Proficiencies: Sleight of Hand, History. Tool Proficiency: Disguise Kit. Equipment Option A: 2 Daggers, Disguise Kit, 2 Pouches, Traveler's Clothes, 16 CP. Equipment Option B: 50 CP. Features: Safe Haven; Criminal Contact.
